snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Choker (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Choker" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Choker" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Mark C. Eshleman for Reel Bear Media

LYRICS
I don't bother anyone
Nervous when I stand
Choking on the circumstance
Only smoking secondhand
Cut us open, spread us out
Dry us in the sand
Lay the fibers side-by-side
And you'll begin to understand

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
...coming for me

I don't bother anyone
Never make demands
Choking on the circumstance
Self-sabotage is a sweet romance
Seems like all I'm worth is what
I'm able to withstand
Sooner I can realize
That pain is just a middle man.

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.

I see no volunteers
to co-sign on my fears
I'll sign on the line
Alone.

I'm gonna change my circumstance
I know I need to move right now
'cause...

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
(only smoking secondhand)

Like a little splinter
buried in your skin
Someone else can carve it out
But when you've got the pin
It hurts a little less
and you can even push it further in
When your body's screaming out
Trust your mind's listening.
Like a silhouette that you can barely see
As the shadow casts upon the ground
where you'll eventually
lay forever, but the day goes on
the sun moves behind you
You get taller, bolder, stronger, 
and the rear-view only blinds you

Subscribe for more official content from Twenty One Pilots: https://top.lnk.to/subscribe

snippet.title: Meet Valkyrie вАУ Apex Legends Character Trailer
snippet.description:
Meet Valkyrie, the ultimate wingman and a Legend who's poised to dominate the sky. http://x.ea.com/68308

Daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper, Valkyrie lost her father at a young age. She inherited her fatherвАЩs love of flight, but not his sense of duty. Except in one regard. She swore to kill the man whoвАЩd sent her father to die: his Faction Leader, Kuben Blisk. But when the moment came to pull the trigger, she hesitated -- he spoke of Viper with respect. And he challenged her to be better. Valkyrie shot him anyway, but she didnвАЩt take his life. Just his invitation card to the Apex Games.

ValkyrieвАЩs jetpack вАУ forged from the remnantвАЩs of ViperвАЩs Northstar Titan вАУ allows her to fly above the battlefield for a limited time. When itвАЩs time to swoop in for the kill, she can unleash a swarm of missiles to damage and disorient her enemy. And if things get too hot she can employ her Ultimate вАУ which allows her and her entire squad the ability to quickly reposition and find the next fight. Valkyrie enters the games with something to prove and ready to rain death down from on high.

ThereвАЩs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if youвАЩre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends вАУ Legacy launches May 4!

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.

Learn more about ValkyrieвАЩs story: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FTk9VD2nPuw
Learn more about Apex Legends вАУ Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.

 Walkiria, c√≥rka s≈Вynnego pilota Tytan√≥w, ≈їmii, straci≈Вa ojca, gdy by≈Вa ma≈ВƒЕ dziewczynkƒЕ. Po ojcu odziedziczy≈Вa mi≈Вo≈ЫƒЗ do lotu, bez towarzyszƒЕcego mu poczucia obowiƒЕzku. Lecz kiedy nadszed≈В czas, by pociƒЕgnƒЕƒЗ za spust, zawaha≈Вa siƒЩ. Blisk m√≥wi≈В o ≈їmii z szacunkiem. Rozpali≈В w niej chƒЩƒЗ stania siƒЩ lepszƒЕ. Walkiria nie zrezygnowa≈Вa z planowanego strza≈Вu. Jednak nie odebra≈Вa mu ≈Љycia. Poprzesta≈Вa na odebraniu mu zaproszenia do Igrzysk Apex.

Gdy nadejdzie odpowiedni moment na atak, mo≈Љe pos≈ВaƒЗ swoim wrogom r√≥j pocisk√≥w, aby powa≈Љnie ich zraniƒЗ i zdezorientowaƒЗ. Kiedy zrobi siƒЩ gorƒЕco, mo≈Љe wykorzystaƒЗ swojƒЕ zdolno≈ЫƒЗ specjalnƒЕ, kt√≥ra pozwala jej zabraƒЗ ca≈Вy sw√≥j oddzia≈В ze sobƒЕ, by szybko przemie≈ЫciƒЗ siƒЩ i nawiƒЕzaƒЗ kolejnƒЕ walkƒЩ. Walkiria przybywa na Igrzyska Apex, aby czego≈Ы dowie≈ЫƒЗ вАУ i jest gotowa zadaƒЗ wrogom ≈ЫmierƒЗ z wysoka.
 
 W tym sezonie nie znajdziecie schronienia, legendy. Gotowi siƒЩ dowiedzieƒЗ, kto jest ≈ВowcƒЕ, a kto zwierzynƒЕ? Odkryjcie swojƒЕ prawdziwƒЕ naturƒЩ ju≈Љ 4 maja, wraz z premierƒЕ Apex Legends вАУ Dziedzictwo.

nl-NL.title: Maak kennis met Valkyrie вАУ Personage-trailer Apex Legends
nl-NL.description:
Maak kennis met Valkyrie, de ultieme wingman en een Legend die klaarstaat om de lucht te domineren. http://x.ea.com/68308
 
 Valkyrie, dochter van de beruchte Titan Pilot Viper, is haar vader op jonge leeftijd kwijtgeraakt. Ze heeft wel de liefde van haar vader voor vliegen, maar niet zijn plichtsbesef ge√Ђrfd. Met √©√©n uitzondering. Ze heeft gezworen om de man te doden die haar vader de dood in had gestuurd: zijn factieleider Kuben Blisk. Maar toen het moment aanbrak waarop ze de trekker moest overhalen, aarzelde ze: hij sprak met respect over Viper. En hij daagde haar uit om beter te zijn. Valkyrie schoot hem toch neer, maar ze maakte hem niet dood. Ze nam alleen zijn uitnodiging voor de Apex Games mee.
 
 Met Valkyries jetpack, die is gemaakt van de restanten van Vipers Northstar Titan, kan ze tijdelijk boven het strijdveld vliegen. Als het tijd is om de vijand te doden, kan ze een zwerm raketten afvuren om de vijand te bestoken en te desori√Ђnteren. En als de grond haar te heet onder de voeten wordt, kan ze gebruik maken van haar Ultimate, waarmee zij en haar hele squad snel opnieuw in positie kunnen komen om het volgende gevecht aan te gaan. Valkyrie doet mee aan de games om iets te bewijzen en staat klaar om de dood van boven te laten komen.
 
 Jullie kunnen je dit seizoen nergens verstoppen, Legends. Wil je weten of je roofdier of prooi bent? Ontdek je ware aard als Apex Legends вАУ Legacy op 4 mei wordt uitgebracht!
 
 Apex LegendsвДҐ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Ѓ4, PlayStation¬Ѓ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.
 
 Meer informatie over het verhaal van Valkyrie: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FTk9VD2nPuw
 Meer informatie over Apex Legends вАУ Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
  
 Bekijk ons YouTube-kanaal: http://x.ea.com/56710.

 #Meet Valkyrie #ApexValkyrie #ApexLegacy #ApexLegends

Ў™ЎєЎ±ўСўБ ЎєўДўЙ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІўДЎЈўКўСЎІЎ±Ў© ЎІўДЎ£ўБЎґўД ўИЎ£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±Ў© Ў™ўБЎ±Ўґ ўЗўКўЕўЖЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ°. http://x.ea.com/68308
 
 ўБўВЎѓЎ™ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ© ЎЈўКўСЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎҐўДўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎіўЗўКЎ± ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў±ЎМ Ў£Ў®ЎІўЗЎІ ўБўК ЎєўЕЎ± ЎµЎЇўКЎ±. ўДўВЎѓ ўИЎ±ЎЂЎ™ Ў≠Ў® Ў£Ў®ўКўЗЎІ ўДўДЎЈўКЎ±ЎІўЖЎМ ўИўДўГўЖўЗЎІ ўДўЕ Ў™Ў±ЎЂ ЎІўДЎ™Ў≤ЎІўЕўЗ. Ў•ўДЎІ ўБўК Ў£ўЕЎ± ўИЎІЎ≠Ўѓ. ўДўВЎѓ Ў£ўВЎ≥ўЕЎ™ ЎєўДўЙ ўВЎ™ўД ЎІўДЎ±ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўВЎ™ўД Ў£Ў®ЎІўЗЎІ: ўВЎІЎ¶Ўѓ ўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўЗЎМ ўГўИЎ®ўКўЖ Ў®ўДўКЎ≥ўГ. ўИўДўГўЖ ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ Ў≠ЎІўЖЎ™ ЎІўДўДЎ≠ЎЄЎ© ўДЎ≥Ў≠Ў® ЎІўДЎ≤ўЖЎІЎѓЎМ Ў™Ў±ЎѓўСЎѓЎ™ -- ўДўВЎѓ Ў™Ў≠ЎѓЎЂ ЎєўЖ ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± Ў®ЎІЎ≠Ў™Ў±ЎІўЕ. ўИЎ™Ў≠ЎѓўСЎІўЗЎІ ўДЎ™ўГўИўЖ Ў£ўБЎґўД. Ў£ЎЈўДўВЎ™ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўК ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± ЎєўДўКўЗ ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ўК Ў≠ЎІўДЎМ ўИўДўГўЖўЗЎІ ўДўЕ Ў™ўВЎґ ЎєўДўКўЗ. ўДўВЎѓ Ў£ЎЃЎ∞Ў™ Ў®ЎЈЎІўВЎ© ЎѓЎєўИЎ™ўЗ Ў•ўДўЙ Ў£ўДЎєЎІЎ® Apex ўБўВЎЈ.
 
 ЎІўДўЕЎ≠Ў±ўСўГ ЎІўДўЖўБўСЎІЎЂ ўДўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўК вАУ ЎІўДўЕЎµўЖўИЎє ўЕўЖ Ў®ўВЎІўКЎІ ЎІўДЎҐўДўК Northstar ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµ Ў®ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± вАУ ўКЎ™ўКЎ≠ ўДўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎЈўКЎ±ЎІўЖ ЎєЎІўДўКўЛЎІ ўБўК Ў≥ЎІЎ≠Ў© ЎІўДўЕЎєЎ±ўГЎ© ўДўИўВЎ™ ўЕЎ≠ЎѓўИЎѓ. ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎ≠ўКўЖ ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ ўДўДЎІўЖЎЈўДЎІўВ Ў®Ў≥Ў±ЎєЎ© ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ЎІўДўВЎ™ўДЎМ ўКўЕўГўЖўЗЎІ Ў•ЎЈўДЎІўВ ўИЎІЎ®ўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўВЎ∞ЎІЎ¶ўБ ўДЎ•ўДЎ≠ЎІўВ ЎІўДЎґЎ±Ў± Ў®ЎєЎѓўИўЗЎІ ўИЎ•Ў±Ў®ЎІўГўЗ. ўИЎ•Ў∞ЎІ Ў£ЎµЎ®Ў≠Ў™ ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўИЎ± Ў£ўГЎЂЎ± ЎіЎѓЎ©ЎМ ўКўЕўГўЖўЗЎІ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓЎІўЕ ЎІўДўВЎѓЎ±Ў© ЎІўДўВЎµўИўЙ ўДЎѓўКўЗЎІ вАУ ўИЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў™ўКЎ≠ ўДўЗЎІ ўИўДўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўЗЎІ Ў®ЎІўДўГЎІўЕўД Ў™ЎЇўКўКЎ± ЎІўДўЕўИўВЎє Ў®Ў≥Ў±ЎєЎ© ўИЎІўДЎєЎЂўИЎ± ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДўВЎ™ЎІўД ЎІўДЎ™ЎІўДўК. Ў™ЎѓЎЃўД ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўК Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ® ўИўДЎѓўКўЗЎІ ЎіўКЎ° ўДЎ•ЎЂЎ®ЎІЎ™ўЗ ўИўЗўК ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓЎ© ўДўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ЎєЎѓЎІЎ° ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ°.
 
 ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕўИЎ≥ўЕЎМ Ў£ўКЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ±. ўЗўД Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДЎІўГЎ™ЎіЎІўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГўЖЎ™ ўЕўБЎ™Ў±Ў≥ўЛЎІ Ў£ўЕ ўБЎ±ўКЎ≥Ў©ЎЯ ЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎєЎѓўЖўГ ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ЎєўЖЎѓ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўБўК 4 ўЕЎІўКўИ!
 
 Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. ЎІўДЎєЎ® Ў®ЎІўДўЕЎђЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ЎєўДўЙ PlayStation¬Ѓ 4ЎМ ўИPlayStation 5ЎМ ўИXbox OneЎМ ўИXbox Series X|SЎМ ўИNintendo SwitchЎМ ўИЎІўДўГўЕЎ®ўКўИЎ™Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµўК ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД Origin ўИSteam.
 
 Ў™ЎєЎ±ўСўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎ≤ўКЎѓ ЎєўЖ ўВЎµЎ© ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўК: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FTk9VD2nPuw

Te presentamos a Valkyrie, la copiloto perfecta y una leyenda preparada para dominar el cielo. http://x.ea.com/68308
 
 Valkyrie, hija del famoso piloto de titanes Viper, perdi√≥ a su padre cuando era peque√±a. De su padre hered√≥ el amor a volar, pero no su sentido del deber. Excepto por una cosa. Y la ret√≥ a ser mejor. Valkyrie le dispar√≥ de todas formas, pero no le arrebat√≥ la vida. Solo su tarjeta de invitaci√≥n a los Juegos Apex.

A la hora de atacar, puede desatar una nube de misiles para da√±ar y desorientar al enemigo. it.title: Valkyrie - Apex Legends - Il trailer
it.description:
Incontra Valkyrie, pilota provetta e leggenda determinata a dominare i cieli. http://x.ea.com/68308
 
 Figlia di Viper, il noto pilota di Titan, Valkyrie ha perso suo padre quando era ancora una bambina. Da lui ha ereditato l'amore per il volo, ma non il senso del dovere. Ma c'√® una cosa a cui non avrebbe mai rinunciato. Valkyrie ha giurato a se stessa che avrebbe ucciso l'uomo che aveva mandato suo padre a morire: Kuben Blisk, leader della sua fazione. Ma sul momento di premere il grilletto, √® stata colta dall'esitazione. Blisk aveva parlato di Viper con rispetto. E l'aveva sfidata ad essere migliore. Valkyrie gli ha sparato ugualmente, ma senza ucciderlo. Non gli ha tolto vita, ma √® andata via con in tasca l'invito per gli Apex Games.
 
 Il jetpack di Valkyrie, costruito con i resti del Northstar di Viper, le consente di sorvolare brevemente il campo di battaglia. Quando √® ora di dare il colpo di grazia ai nemici, pu√≤ scatenare una tempesta di missili che li danneggia e li disorienta. E se la situazione si fa troppo pericolosa pu√≤ sempre attivare la sua Ultimate, che aiuta lei e la sua squadra a riposizionarsi velocemente e lanciarsi nello scontro successivo. Valkyrie ha qualcosa da dimostrare, ed √® pronta a unirsi alla competizione per far piovere morte e distruzione sui nemici.

snippet.title: Apex Legends вАУ Legacy Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Apex Legends: Legacy brings a new form of competition, Arenas. Drop into a new action-packed 3v3 game mode. Sharpen your skills in new, bespoke maps like Party Crasher and Phase Runner. ItвАЩs just your squad and their squad, so hiding isnвАЩt an option.

WeвАЩd wish you luck, but in Arenas, there isnвАЩt any. This is a true test of skill.

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper, is also joining the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus thatвАЩs been mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

ThereвАЩs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if youвАЩre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends: Legacy launches May 4!

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.

pl.title: Zwiastun rozgrywki Apex Legends вАУ Dziedzictwo
pl.description:
Przygotuj siƒЩ na co≈Ы wiƒЩcej ni≈Љ Battle Royale. Ju≈Љ jutro o godz. 17:00 obejrzyj zwiastun rozgrywki Apex Legends вАУ Dziedzictwo i dowiedz siƒЩ wiƒЩcej o najnowszym trybie gry.
Apex Legends вАУ Dziedzictwo wprowadza nowy rodzaj rywalizacji: Areny. Ruszaj do walki w pe≈Вnym akcji trybie 3 na 3. Popraw swoje umiejƒЩtno≈Ыci, walczƒЕc na specjalnie przygotowanych mapach, takich jak вАЮNieproszony go≈ЫƒЗвАЭ i вАЮTunel fazowyвАЭ. W walce biorƒЕ udzia≈В tylko dwa oddzia≈Вy, wiƒЩc ukrycie siƒЩ nie wchodzi w grƒЩ.

Do Igrzysk do≈ВƒЕcza r√≥wnie≈Љ Walkiria, c√≥rka s≈Вynnego pilota Tytan√≥w, ≈їmii. Wykorzystaj jej plecak odrzutowy, by zdominowaƒЗ przestworza i zasypaƒЗ wrog√≥w chmarƒЕ rakiet. Skorzystaj z nowego, niezwykle precyzyjnego ≈Вuku Bocek, by przygwo≈ЇdziƒЗ wrog√≥w, i zbadaj tajemniczo odmieniony Olimp. мХЕл™ЕлЖТмЭА нГАмЭінГД нММмЭЉлЯњ л∞ФмЭінНЉмЭШ лФЄ л∞ЬнВ§л¶ђ лШРнХЬ мГИл°ЬмЪі л†Им†ДлУЬл°Ь м∞Єм†ДнХ©лЛИлЛ§. м†ЬнКЄнМ©мЭД мЭімЪ©нХШмЧђ к≥µм§СмЭД мІАл∞∞нХШк≥† м†БмЧРк≤М лѓЄмВђмЭЉмЭД нНЉлґАмЬЉмЛ≠мЛЬмШ§. к≥†м†Хл∞А л≥імДє л≥імЪ∞ мВђмЪ©л≤ХмЭД лІИмК§нД∞нХШмЧђ м†БмЧРк≤М нЩФмВімЭД лІЮмґЬ м§АлєДл•Љ нХШк≥†, мИШмИШкїШлБЉм≤ШлЯЉ л≥АнХіл≤Дл¶∞ мШђл¶ЉнСЄмК§мЧР лЫ∞мЦілУЬмЛ≠мЛЬмШ§. кЈЄл¶ђк≥† мµЬмЛ† л∞∞нЛА нМ®мК§л•Љ мЖРмЧР лД£мЦі лЮ≠нБђ л¶ђкЈЄмЧРмДЬ мЮРмЛ†мЭШ мЛ§л†•мЭД м¶Эл™ЕнХШмЛ≠мЛЬмШ§.

л†Им†ДлУЬлУ§мЭімЧђ, мЭіл≤И мЛЬм¶МмЧРмДЬлКФ мИ®мЭД к≥≥мЭі мЧЖмКµлЛИлЛ§. мЮРмЛ†мЭі мВђлГ•кЊЉмЭЄмІА, л®ємЭімЭЄмІА мХМмХДлВЉ м§АлєДк∞А лРШмЧИмКµлЛИкєМ? 5мЫФ 4мЭЉ мЛЬмЮСнХШлКФ Apex л†Им†ДлУЬ вАУ л†Ик±∞мЛЬмЧРмДЬ мЮРмЛ†мЭШ мІДм†ХнХЬ лВіл©імЭД лІМлВШл≥імЛ≠мЛЬмШ§!

Apex л†Им†ДлУЬвДҐлКФ м†ДмД§м†БмЭЄ мЇРл¶≠нД∞лУ§мЭі мШБкіСк≥Љ л™ЕмД±, лґАл•Љ мЯБмЈ®нХШкЄ∞ мЬДнХі нФДлЯ∞нЛ∞мЦімЭШ л≥Ак≤љмЧРмДЬ мєШмЧінХЬ м†ДнИђл•Љ л≤МмЭілКФ лґАлґД мЬ†л£М л∞∞нЛА л°ЬмЦД к≤МмЮДмЮЕлЛИлЛ§. PlayStation¬Ѓ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, PC Origin л∞П SteamмЧРмДЬ лђіл£М нФМл†ИмЭінХШмЛ≠мЛЬмШ§.

it.title: Apex Legends - Origini - Il trailer del gameplay
it.description:
Preparati ad andare oltre la battle royale. Collegati domani alle 17:00 (CEST) per non perderti il trailer del gameplay di Origini e scopri un modo tutto nuovo di giocare.
La Stagione 9 segna l'arrivo di una nuova forma di competizione: Arene. Mettiti subito alla prova in questa modalit√† 3v3 piena d'azione. Affina le tue abilit√† nelle nuove mappe, come Guastafeste e Condotto fasico. √И la tua squadra contro la loro, perci√≤ nascondersi sar√† impossibile.

Ti augureremmo buona fortuna, ma in Arene la fortuna non conta. Preparati ad affrontare una prova di abilit√† senza precedenti.

Valkyrie, figlia del noto pilota di Titan Viper, si unisce agli Apex Games. Sfrutta il suo jetpack per dominare la battaglia dall'alto e fai piovere missili sui nemici. Prova il nuovo arco Bocek per annientare gli avversari con la massima precisione e scopri la misteriosa trasformazione di Olympus. Infine, ottieni il nuovo pass battaglia e dai prova di te in Classificata.

Preparati ad affrontare il pericolo a viso aperto, leggenda. Sarai predatore o preda? Scopri la tua vera natura nella Stagione 9 di Apex Legends, in arrivo il 4 maggio!

Apex LegendsвДҐ √® un gioco gratuito in stile battle royale in cui personaggi leggendari si sfidano per gloria, fama e ricchezza ai margini della Frontiera. Gioca gratis su PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch e PC tramite Origin e Steam.

ar.title: Ў•ЎєўДЎІўЖ Ў£Ў≥ўДўИЎ® ўДЎєЎ® Apex Legends вАУ Legacy
ar.description:
ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДўДЎІўЖЎЈўДЎІўВ Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎІ Ў®ЎєЎѓ ўЕЎєЎ±ўГЎ© Ў®ЎІЎ™ўД Ў±ўИўКЎІўД. Ў™ЎІЎ®ЎєўЖЎІ ЎЇЎѓўЛЎІ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎєЎ© 8 ЎµЎ®ЎІЎ≠ўЛЎІ Ў®ЎІўДЎ™ўИўВўКЎ™ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІЎ≥ўКўБўКўГўК ўДўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© Ў•ЎєўДЎІўЖ Ў£Ў≥ўДўИЎ® ўДЎєЎ® Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўИЎ™ЎєЎ±ўСўБ ЎєўДўЙ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ° ЎєўЖ ЎЈЎ±ўКўВЎ© ЎІўДўДЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ўЗЎ∞ўЗ.
Ў™ўВЎѓўСўЕ Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ЎіўГўДЎІўЛ ЎђЎѓўКЎѓўЛЎІ ўДўДўЕўЖЎІўБЎ≥Ў©: ЎІўДЎ≠ўДЎ®ЎІЎ™. ЎІўЖЎЈўДўВ ўБўК ўЖўЕЎЈ ўДЎєЎ® 3 ЎґЎѓ 3 ЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўЕўДўКЎ° Ў®ЎІўДЎ≠Ў±ўГЎ©. ЎІЎіЎ≠Ў∞ ўЕўЗЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ўГ ўБўК ЎІўДЎЃЎ±ЎІЎ¶ЎЈ ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ЎІўДўЕЎЃЎµЎµЎ© ўЕЎЂўД Party Crasher ўИPhase Runner. ЎІўДЎ£ўЕЎ± Ў®ўКўЖ ўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўГ ўИўБЎ±ўВЎ™ўЗўЕ ўБЎ≠Ў≥Ў®ЎМ ўДЎ∞ўДўГ ўДўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ЎЃўКЎІЎ±ўЛЎІ ўЕўЕўГўЖўЛЎІ.

ўЖўИўСЎѓ Ў£ўЖ ўЖЎ™ўЕўЖўЙ ўДўГ Ў≠ЎЄўЛЎІ ЎЈўКЎ®ўЛЎІЎМ ўИўДўГўЖ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ≠ўДЎ®ЎІЎ™ЎМ ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕЎђЎІўД ўДўДЎ≠ЎЄ. Ў•ўЖўЗ ЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ± Ў≠ўВўКўВўК ўДўДўЕўЗЎІЎ±Ў©.

Ў™ўЖЎґўЕ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ© ЎЈўКЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎҐўДўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎіўЗўКЎ± ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ® Ў£ўКЎґўЛЎІ. ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўБЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎ≠Ў±ўСўГ ЎІўДўЖўБўСЎІЎЂ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµ Ў®ўЗЎІ ўДўДўЗўКўЕўЖЎ© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ° ўИЎ•ЎЈўДЎІўВ ўИЎІЎ®ўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўВЎ∞ЎІЎ¶ўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГ. Ў£Ў™ўВўЖ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓЎІўЕ ўВўИЎ≥ Bocek ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўК ЎІўДЎѓўВЎ© ўДўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГЎМ ўИЎІўЖЎ™ўВўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎЃЎ±ўКЎЈЎ© Olympus ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў≠ўИўСўДЎ™ Ў®ЎµўИЎ±Ў© ЎЇЎІўЕЎґЎ©. Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ ЎІЎ≠ЎµўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў£Ў≠ЎѓЎЂ Battle Pass ўИЎ£ЎЂЎ®Ў™ ЎђЎѓЎІЎ±Ў™ўГ ўБўК Ranked.

ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕўИЎ≥ўЕЎМ Ў£ўКЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ±. ўЗўД Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДЎІўГЎ™ЎіЎІўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГўЖЎ™ ўЕўБЎ™Ў±Ў≥ўЛЎІ Ў£ўЕ ўБЎ±ўКЎ≥Ў©ЎЯ ЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎєЎѓўЖўГ ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ЎєўЖЎѓ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўБўК 4 ўЕЎІўКўИ!

Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. ЎІўДЎєЎ® Ў®ЎІўДўЕЎђЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ЎєўДўЙ PlayStation¬Ѓ 4ЎМ ўИPlayStation 5ЎМ ўИXbox OneЎМ ўИXbox Series X|SЎМ ўИNintendo SwitchЎМ ўИЎІўДўГўЕЎ®ўКўИЎ™Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµўК ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД Origin ўИSteam.

Ў™ЎєЎ±ўСўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДўЕЎ≤ўКЎѓ ЎєўЖ Apex Legends вАУ Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308

ja.title: гАМгВ®гГЉгГЪгГГгВѓгВєгГђгВЄгВІгГ≥гВЇ вАУ иЛ±йЫДгБЃиїМиЈ°гАНгВ≤гГЉгГ†гГЧгГђгВ§гГИгГђгГЉгГ©гГЉ

гАМгВ®гГЉгГЪгГГгВѓгВєгГђгВЄгВІгГ≥гВЇ вАУ иЛ±йЫДгБЃиїМиЈ°гАНгБІжЦ∞гБЯгБ™еѓЊжИ¶ељҐеЉПгАБгАМгВҐгГ™гГЉгГКгАНгБМеЃЯи£ЕгБХгВМгВЛгАВгВҐгВѓгВЈгГІгГ≥жЇАиЉЙгБЃ3еѓЊ3гБЃгВ≤гГЉгГ†гГҐгГЉгГЙгБЂз™БеЕ•гАВгГХгВІгГЉгВЇгГ©гГ≥гГКгГЉгВДгГСгГЉгГЖгВ£гГЉгВѓгГ©гГГгВЈгГ£гГЉгБ™гБ©гАБзЙєеИ•дїХжІШгБЃгГЮгГГгГЧгБЂжМСгВУгБІиЕХгВТз†ФгБОжЊДгБЊгБЫгВИгБЖгАВеРЫгБЃйГ®йЪКгБ®жХµгБЃйГ®йЪКгБЃгБњгБІе±ХйЦЛгБЩгВЛзЫіжО•еѓЊж±ЇгБІгБѓгАБйЪ†гВМгВЛгБУгБ®гБ™гБ©дЄНеПѓиГљгБ†гАВ

ж≠¶йБЛгВТз•ИгБ£гБЯгБ®гБУгВНгБІгАБгБУгБЃгВҐгГ™гГЉгГКгБІгБѓзД°жДПеС≥гАВзЬЯгБЃеЃЯеКЫгБМи©¶гБХгВМгВЛгБЃгБ†гАВ

snippet.description:
La marina de Indonesia hizo p√Їblico un video que envi√≥ la tripulaci√≥n de un submarino antes de naufragar frente a Bali, hace pocas semanas. En las im√°genes se puede apreciar a los tripulantes cantando una tradicional canci√≥n de despedida.

El video fue filmado a bordo del nav√≠o KRI Nanggala 402, de fabricaci√≥n alemana, en cuyo naufragio murieron sus 53 tripulantes. En sus √Їltimos momentos, la tripulaci√≥n decidi√≥ cantar вАЬSampai JumpaвАЭ, una canci√≥n indonesia que significa вАЬAdi√≥sвАЭ.

I couldnвАЩt help it, I put you through hell
I donвАЩt know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back вАШcause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that itвАЩs much too late
And you deserve someone better

snippet.title: Apex Legends вАУ Legacy Launch Trailer
snippet.description:
ThereвАЩs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if youвАЩre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends вАУ Legacy launches May 4!

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper joins the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

And get ready to go beyond battle royale. 

Apex LegendsвДҐ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on Xbox One, PS4, and Origin and Steam for PC.

Learn more about Apex Legends вАУ Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#MeetValkyrie #ApexLegacy #ApexLegends 

вАЬWatch Me NowвАЭ
Performed by Tommee Profitt (feat. Beacon Light)

ўДЎІ ўКўИЎђЎѓ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўДўДЎІЎЃЎ™Ў®ЎІЎ° ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕўИЎ≥ўЕЎМ Ў£ўКЎ™ўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥ЎІЎЈўКЎ±. ўЗўД Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДЎІўГЎ™ЎіЎІўБ ўЕЎІ Ў•Ў∞ЎІ ўГўЖЎ™ ўЕўБЎ™Ў±Ў≥ўЛЎІ Ў£ўЕ ўБЎ±ўКЎ≥Ў©ЎЯ ЎІўГЎ™ЎіўБ ўЕЎєЎѓўЖўГ ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ЎєўЖЎѓ Ў•ЎµЎѓЎІЎ± Apex Legends вАУ Legacy ўБўК 4 ўЕЎІўКўИ!

Ў™ўЖЎґўЕ ўБЎІўДўГЎ±ўКЎМ ЎІЎ®ўЖЎ© ЎЈўКЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎҐўДўКўКўЖ ЎІўДЎіўЗўКЎ± ўБЎІўКЎ®Ў± Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ®. ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўБЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎ≠Ў±ўСўГ ЎІўДўЖўБўСЎІЎЂ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµ Ў®ўЗЎІ ўДўДўЗўКўЕўЖЎ© ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ° ўИЎ•ЎЈўДЎІўВ ўИЎІЎ®ўД ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўВЎ∞ЎІЎ¶ўБ ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГ. Ў£Ў™ўВўЖ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЃЎѓЎІўЕ ўВўИЎ≥ Bocek ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўК ЎІўДЎѓўВЎ© ўДўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎЃЎµўИўЕўГЎМ ўИЎІўЖЎ™ўВўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎЃЎ±ўКЎЈЎ© Olympus ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™Ў≠ўИўСўДЎ™ Ў®ЎµўИЎ±Ў© ЎЇЎІўЕЎґЎ©. Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ ЎІЎ≠ЎµўД ЎєўДўЙ Ў£Ў≠ЎѓЎЂ Battle Pass ўИЎ£ЎЂЎ®Ў™ ЎђЎѓЎІЎ±Ў™ўГ ўБўК Ranked.

ўИЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎєЎѓ ўДўДЎІўЖЎЈўДЎІўВ Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎІ Ў®ЎєЎѓ ўЕЎєЎ±ўГЎ© Ў®ЎІЎ™ўД Ў±ўИўКЎІўД. 

Apex LegendsвДҐвАО ўЗўК ўДЎєЎ®Ў© ўЕЎєЎІЎ±ўГ ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ© Ў≠ўКЎЂ Ў™Ў™ўВЎІЎ™ўД ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў£Ў≥ЎЈўИЎ±ўКЎ© Ў®Ў≠ЎЂўЛЎІ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎѓ ўИЎІўДЎіўЗЎ±Ў© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўИЎ© ЎєўДўЙ Ў£ЎЈЎ±ЎІўБ Frontier. ЎІўДЎєЎ® ўЕЎђЎІўЖўЛЎІ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ЎєўДўЙ Xbox OneЎМ ўИPS4ЎМ ўИOrigin ўИSteam ўДўДўГўЕЎ®ўКўИЎ™Ў± ЎІўДЎіЎЃЎµўК.

Que est√° llena de predica
Como mensaje quimetrica
Pero no de pol√©mica
Y sigue dormido y despierta en Am√©rica

Lo cambiaron por lo que ofende
Y porque este problema se exalta

Distorsionada seria tu apellido

Les doy lo que conviene quieren lo contrario
Lo que entretiene no es lo necesario
////De eso que mata pero vende////

Las buenas noticias est√°n llenas de polvo
Yo les hablo del verbo y de esa fuente no quieren ni un sorbo
La pasi√≥n la cambiaron por like no se hagan los sordos
Que en el tren de la murmuraci√≥n se treparon a bordo

Vampiro con hambre lo que quieren es sangre
Y no la del hijo del hombre no genera tendencia su nombre
Les hable de Jes√Їs en cada canci√≥n que les dejo
Pero ya no les gusta el le√≥n sino la menciona un conejo
Trending la adicci√≥n por el trending
Y Jes√Їs es el que empending
El mundo esta ending
Pero esa noticia no genera vending

Yo te invito pa que veas
La aplicaci√≥n de la Biblia y la leas
Tu m√≥vil no sirve pa¬і eso
Pero si pa¬і grabar una pelea

Les doy lo que conviene quieren lo contrario
Lo que entretiene no lo necesario
////De eso que mata pero vende////

B√°jale, b√°jale, b√°jale a la cultura del bochinche
Echando gasolina al fuego
Haciendo que la picadura se hinche
Pregunta inmadura respuesta picante
Te fabrican un contrincante
Vete a ver los comentarios
Tu contenido no est√° edificando

En la realidad comunicadores con falta de creatividad
Que en vez de alimentar el alma alimentan la morbosidad
Clickbait enga√±oso con amarillismo para encender
Cuando vas a chequear la noticia, no tiene nada que ver

Da c√°ncer a quien se lo fume

Les doy lo que conviene quieren lo contrario

////De eso que mata pero vende////

snippet.title: Wisin, Myke Towers, Maluma y Anitta abren los Latin AMAs 2021 con 'Mi Ni√±a' | Latin AMAвАЩs 2021
snippet.description:
Video oficial de Telemundo Entretenimiento. As√≠ arranc√≥ la entrega de los Latin American Music Awards 2021, con Wisin, Myke Towers, Maluma y Anitta en el escenario cantando un remix de 'Mi Ni√±a'.

Latin AMAs

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into JustinвАЩs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

JUSTICE the album out now: https://JustinBieber.lnk.to/Justice

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso рЯТНрЯСЂ
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. вАЬDios as√≠ lo quisoвАЭ es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√Їo  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬њPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√Їsica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬њpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? Yo lo recib√≠a como un ¬њqui√©n sabe?, ¬њcu√°ndo podr√° ser? o lo recib√≠a como: ¬°alg√Їn d√≠a tendr√© una canci√≥n apropiada para hacer con √©l! Pero cuando le mont√© la voz a esta canci√≥n me tom√© el atrevimiento de escribirle, le mostr√© el tema y le dije que so√±aba con poder  hacerla con √©l. Juan Luis no me dej√≥ terminar, literalmente, no me dej√≥ terminar. Me dijo que estaba encantado con la canci√≥n y por supuesto me dijo que s√≠. De ah√≠ en adelante todo transcurri√≥ de maravilla, hasta que Juan Luis mont√≥ voces, me la envi√≥ e hicimos esta edici√≥n de los dos. En tiempo de pandemia fue imposible juntarnos. Pero creo que el resultado es m√°s que obvio. Es una hermos√≠sima canci√≥n de amor que espero toque el coraz√≥n a todo el mundo.
вАФ

snippet.title: A Pesar De M√≠ | Alex Zurdo x Redimi2 x Funky Ft. Un Coraz√≥n, Indiomar, Abby Valdez
snippet.description:
A Pesar De M√≠ | Alex Zurdo x Redimi2 x Funky Ft. UnCorazon, Indiomar, Abby Valdez (Video Oficial) 

Te invitamos a seguir la playlist oficial de UNO en Spotify
 https://bit.ly/UNOOFICIAL  рЯО§рЯФКвАЛ

Escucha el √Бlbum UNO en Tiendas Digitales:

Apple Music: http://apple.co/3tIZyJuвАЛ
Amazon Music: https://amzn.to/3q5JRtPвАЛ
Deezer: http://bit.ly/3rwJqc4вАЛ

Letra:
[Indiomar]
Aun no soy lo que t√Ї quieres 
Y se que me amas igual
Pero la obra va por donde debe
Tu la vas a completar

Y aunque yo perfecto no soy
Estoy donde √©l quiere que est√©

Porque a pesar de m√≠ siempre tu estar√°s
Yo soy para ti, no me soltaras
Y aunque yo perfecto no soy
Estoy donde √©l quiere que est√©

[Un Coraz√≥n]
No siempre hago lo que quiero
No lo puedo comprender
La raz√≥n porque prefiero
Lo que no debo de hacer

A√Їn asi me amas
Aunque aveces me tropiece
En tus brazos yo me rendir√©
Siempre seguir√© tu luz
//Quiero corresponder a tu amor//

Y a pesar de m√≠ siempre tu estar√°s
Yo soy para ti no me soltaras

Y aunque yo perfecto no soy
Estoy donde √©l quiere que est√©

[Funky]
Y a pesar de como he sido
Siempre t√Ї me has bendecido
Y yo vivo convencido
Que no hay nadie como t√Ї Jes√Їs

Yo tome mi cruz fue para seguirte
Para cantarte y decirte
Gracias por lo que hiciste
Aunque mis actos suelen herirte
De mi lado no quieres irte

Entonces t√Ї me buscas y me voy
Y me encuentras donde estoy
Tengo tu gracia hoy
A pesar de como soy

[Redimi2]
A pesar de m√≠ tu sigues conmigo
Nunca me niegas el amparo de tu abrigo
Si caigo me levantas y yo prosigo
Quisiera comprender tu amor y no lo consigo

Por siempre te amar√© lo que me pidas te dar√©
Por donde me lleves te seguir√©
Tu sabes quien soy cuando nadie me ve
Sabes de mi corazon m√°s de lo que yo se

Lo s√© eres el estandarte
En tus manos soy una obra de arte
Nadie puede igualarte
Sencillamente eres clase aparte

Y a pesar de m√≠ siempre tu estar√°s
Yo soy para ti, no me faltaras
Y aunque yo perfecto no soy
Estoy donde √©l quiere que est√©

[Abby Valdez]
Yo no quiero que se apague
Este fallo que hay en mi interior
De mi corazon la llave te la doy

Porque t√Ї, t√Ї eres mi aire
Haz cambiado mi lamento en baile
//De tu mano no me soltar√©//
De tu lado yo me quedare
//Y de aqu√≠ no me ir√©//

[Alex Zurdo]
Y a pesar de las fallas
Tu amor no se calla
Ven fortalece mi agalla
Y si me subo al ring
Y no doy la talla
Nunca tiro la toalla

//Tu viste en mi lo que no veo
Me hiciste free cuando era un reo
Eres el sol donde bronceo
Mi alma y la paz que poseo//

Y a pesar de m√≠ siempre tu estar√°s
Yo soy para ti, no me soltar√°s
Y aunque yo perfecto no soy
Estoy donde √©l quiere que est√©

Si hay millones, millones
